products.name: Blackberry Cheesecake 🔥
products.description: Rich and creamy cheesecake made with premium cream cheese, topped with a smooth blackberry sauce and fresh berries. Perfect balance between sweetness and tanginess for a refreshing dessert experience.

products.name: Blackberry Tarte
products.description: Golden crispy tart filled with silky vanilla cream and topped with juicy blackberries. A delightful mix of crunch and softness in every bite.

products.description: Light and fluffy vanilla sponge cake layered with fresh blueberry cream and topped with a glossy blueberry glaze. A perfect choice for fruit lovers.

products.description: Warm, fudgy chocolate brownie served with a scoop of creamy vanilla ice cream. The perfect dessert for chocolate lovers who enjoy a hot and cold contrast.

products.name: Caramel Chocolate
products.description: Smooth milk chocolate filled with a rich, gooey caramel center that melts in your mouth. A luxurious treat for caramel and chocolate fans.
